positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration of a whimsical, stylized astronaut floating through a nebula field. The astronaut is rendered in a solid, clean silhouette, integrated with celestial elements like stylized crescent moons, orbiting rings, and abstract constellations. The composition should be centrally balanced, using only two or three highly contrasting colors (e.g., deep indigo, electric cyan, and stark white) for a graphic, modern aesthetic. Emphasize thick, crisp line art and flat color blocking for maximum print clarity. Perfect for screen printing on dark apparel.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermarks, text, signature, logo, bad anatomy, low resolution, blurry, noisy, excess details, complex shading, grayscales, photorealism
